message:
feat(core): add calibration harness and promotion gate types (ft-2p9cb.4.4.1)

CalibrationScenario, CalibrationResult, PromotionGateConfig,
PromotionVerdict, CalibrationSnapshot, CalibrationHarness with
strict/lenient gate evaluation. 17 unit tests (553 total).
